questions.question: Ese koperative ifite ubuzima gatozi?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza koo koperativwe if ubuzima gatozi

questions.question: Ni ayahe mazina ya perezida wa koperative?
Ni iyihe nomero ya telefone ya perezida wa koperative?

questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko Koperative yatangiranye n'abanyamuryango ba abagore byibuze 30% byabanyamuryango bose

questions.question: Koperative yatangiranye n'abanyamuryango bangahe?
Ese ubu koperative igizwe n'abanyamuryango ba ngahe ba abagabo?
Ese ubu koperative igizwe n'abanyamuryango ba ngahe ba abagore?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko abagore babanyamuryango bafite byibuze 30% byabanyamuryango bose

questions.question: Ese ubu koperative igizwe n'abanyamuryango ba ngahe?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko abanyamuryango bariho ubu barenze cyangwa bangana abanyamuryango ba mbere.

questions.question: Mwaba mwarakoze inama rusange muri werurwe na Ugushyingo ?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko koperative ikora inama zinteko rusange muri Werurwe & Ukwakira.

questions.question: Haba hari ishusho y'umutungo(imari) yagaragajwe mu nama yo muri werurwe?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko ishusho y'umutungo(imari) yagaragajwe mu nama yo muri Werurwe.

questions.question: Ese mufite inyandiko mvugo z'inama zose zabaye za koperative?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko inyandiko zabitswe.

questions.question: Koperative ifite komite y'inama y'ubutegetsi?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko ufite Inama y'Ubutegetsi.

questions.question: Komite y'inama y'ubutegitsi igizwe n'abanyamuryango bangahe ba abagabo?
Komite y'inama y'ubutegitsi igizwe n'abanyamuryango bangahe  ba abagore?
Komite y'inama y'ubutegitsi igizwe n'abanyamuryango bangahe ?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko komite y'Inama y'Ubuyobozi iruta cyangwa ingana na 5 kandi igomba kuba umubare utagabanyika na kabiri

questions.question: Mu bagize inama y'ubutegetsi, abagore ni bangahe ku ijana?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko abagore bagize Inama y'ubutegetsi nibura 30% Mu bagize inama y'ubutegetsi

questions.question: Komite y'inama y'ubutegetsi iterana kangahe mu mwaka?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko  y'inama y'ubutegetsi iterana byibuze rimwe mu gihembwe, mu bihembwe bine bigize umwaka.

questions.question: Koperative ifite komite ngenzuzi igizwe n'abanyamuryango 3 batowe n'inteko rusange?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko ufite komite ngenzuzi

questions.question: Inama ya komite ngenzuzi iterana kangahe mu mwaka?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko  komite ngenzuzi iterana byibuze rimwe mu gihembwe, mu bihembwe bine bigize umwaka.

questions.question: Komite y'inama y'ubutegetsi imaze manda zingahe kubuyobozi?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko  y'inama y'ubutegetsi imaze manda zitarenze ebyiri.

questions.question: Komite ngenzuzi imaze manda Zingahe kubuyobozi?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko komite ngenzuzi imaze manda zitarenze ebyiri

questions.question: Ese koperative ifite raport z'ubugenzuzi z'umwaka w'ingengo y'imari ushize ?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko koperative ifite raporo zubugenzuzi bwumwaka ushize..

questions.question: Ese Koperative ifite nyandiko zemewe n'amategeko?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko koperative ifite ibyangombwa byemewe n'amategeko.

questions.question: Muri izi nyandiko zemewe na amategeko zikurikira,koperative ifititemo zingahe?
options: kopi y’Itegeko rigenga amakoperative mu Rwanda
amategeko agenga imyitwarire y’abayobozi ba koperative n’abakozi bayo
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko koperative ifite ibi ibyangombwa byose byemewe n'amategeko.

questions.question: Abakozi ba Koperative baba bafite amasezereno yanditse bijyanye n'amategeko ya koperative ndetse n'ay'umurimo?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko koperative ifite amasezerano yanditse yerekeye amategeko ya koperative & umurimo.

questions.question: Ese Koperative ifite uburyo bwo gucunga Umutungo?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko koperative ifite inyandiko zerekana imari.

questions.question: Ni ubuhe uburyo bukurikira bwo gucunga Umutungo Koperative ifite?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko koperative ifite izi nyandiko zose z’imari.

questions.question: Mu isizeni ishize, ni igishoro kingana iki ku ijana (%) cyakoreshejwe mu kugura ibitumbwe mu bahinzi?
questions.recommendation: Menya neza ko ijanisha ry’imari shingiro yose yakoreshejwe mu kugura cheri ku bahinzi byibuze 80%.

questions.question: Mu isizeni ishize,Ikigereranyo cy'ikawa y'igitumbwe ku kawa ya amaganda cyanganaga gite?
questions.recommendation: igipimo kigomba kuba kiri hagati y' ibiro 4.9-5.5k.
